name: Shadow Wraith Ambush
description: Dark spirits materialize from the shadows, their touch freezing and their wails terrifying!

dungeon_l1_encounter_3_complete.display_message: The wraiths dissipate with agonized screams. The way forward to the deeper levels is open.

dungeon_level_1_complete.display_message: Level 1 cleared! The stairs to Level 2 are now accessible.

special_rules.description: Wraiths have resistance to physical damage, vulnerable to radiant/holy

ambient_description: The air grows cold. Shadows writhe unnaturally along the walls. Suddenly, spectral forms emerge with chilling wails!
victory_description: The wraiths dissolve into wisps of shadow, their tortured souls finally released. The oppressive cold lifts from the chamber.
defeat_description: You retreat, the wraiths' mournful cries following you. The temperature returns to normal as you leave their domain.
